column1: # LIMEN Boost Shard 013 Source-Family Saturation Report (Updated)
Supports hostile-reviewer-pass by identifying source family coverage gaps and blocked source patterns that could undermine evidence claims in the AI Edge-Case Atlas manuscript.
- Source-family taxonomy from review lane outputs
- Direct source review queue analysis (19 blocked/translation-sensitive candidates)
- Expired domain archives: 3 instances (e.g., Spanish-Portuguese lanes)
- Language-specific barriers: 7 instances requiring translation review
- Source family distribution pie chart (emphasizing underrepresented categories)
- Blocked source map overlay (highlighting paywalled/legal and expired domains)
- Strengthens Limitations section by quantifying coverage gaps (19 total blocked/translation-sensitive sources)
- Provides audit trail for Reviewer Q4 (source diversity) with specific examples
- Enables dashboard/paper parity in Figures 2/5/7 through updated visualization hooks
- Route 7 translation-sensitive candidates to translation-aware source review
- Use machine translation with human verification workflow
- Attempt alternative access for 5 paywalled legal databases
- Validate 3 expired domains via Archive.org/Wayback Machine
